samples.body:
@paambaati try this command:

`primitive -i test.png -o test.svg -n 100 -m 0 -bg #ffffff00`

Reading the code in color.go I found out that the input color is intended as one of this:
- #RGB
- #RGBA
- #RRGGBB
- #RRGGBBAA

AA is the alpha channel value, so if you want it to be transparent just set it to 00

repo.description: A search widget that allows users to search a given zAPIness endpoint.
repo.name: zAPIness-search-widget

pull_request.body: ### Updates ___Use ```react-measure``` to track the size of screen___ - The previously used ```react-media``` pollutes the pure components and make testing harder ___Revamp mobile design___ - Remove redundant padding and background color - Make font-size bigger ___Autocomplete feature on advanced search___ - Using ```react-select```, autocomplete user input on the advanced search ___Clear all button on the keyword input box___ - Clear all user input when user click the x button ___Real Time Validation in Advanced Search___ - Validate user selection immediately when users do selections ### Bug Fixes ___Fix Pagination___ - Pagination does not show the last page previously ___Place - (desktop) n/a(mobile) for empty values in result___ - Empty values are confusing in the table view ___Retain user input when user clicks on the looking glass icon___ - Remember every user input when user types __
